from google.cloud import storage
from boto3 import client as boto3_client


def upload_file_to_gcs(bucket_name: str, file_path: str, data: bytes) -> dict:
    client = storage.Client()
    bucket = client.bucket(bucket_name)
    blob = bucket.blob(file_path)
    blob.upload_from_string(data)
    return {"bucket": bucket_name, "path": file_path, "size": len(data)}


def save_to_s3(bucket_name: str, key: str, data: bytes) -> dict:
    s3 = boto3_client("s3")
    s3.put_object(Bucket=bucket_name, Key=key, Body=data)
    return {"bucket": bucket_name, "key": key, "size": len(data)}


def write_to_firestore(collection: str, doc_id: str, data: dict) -> dict:
    from google.cloud import firestore
    db = firestore.Client()
    doc_ref = db.collection(collection).document(doc_id)
    doc_ref.set(data)
    return {"collection": collection, "doc_id": doc_id, "status": "written"}


def upload_to_azure(container: str, blob_name: str, data: bytes) -> dict:
    from azure.storage.blob import BlobServiceClient
    client = BlobServiceClient.from_connection_string("connection_string")
    blob_client = client.get_blob_client(container, blob_name)
    blob_client.upload_blob(data)
    return {"container": container, "blob": blob_name, "size": len(data)}
